arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola could clash with Lionel Messi as FIFA confirm Club World Cup decision
arts.sum: Lionel Messi could face his former Barcelona manager Pep Guardiola after FIFA confirms Inter Miami's invite for the 2025 Club World Cup in the USA.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville reveals he’d break his own golden rule for Pep Guardiola in honest admission
arts.sum: Gary Neville has been left severely unimpressed by The FA's appointment of Thomas Tuchel, but there is one foreign coach he would be willing to make an exception for as England manager

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gives perfect response to Sir Alex Ferguson Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has praised Sir Alex Ferguson after Ineos decided to remove the iconic Scot from his position as Man United ambassador.

arts.ttl: Why Kyle Walker and Kevin De Bruyne aren't in Man City squad vs Wolves
arts.sum: Kyle Walker is absent from Manchester City's Premier League squad vs Wolves on Sunday to add to their injury concerns.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs. Man City team news: Gary O'Neil, Pep Guardiola make five changes between them for Molineux clash
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers and Manchester City make two and three changes respectively for Sunday's Premier League fixture at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Arsenal supporters aim chant at Manchester City after Bournemouth defeat
arts.sum: As Arsenal were defeated by Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium, supporters aimed a chant at Manchester City

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Man City LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Erling Haaland starts
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side lost at Molineux last season and will be determined to keep pace in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker in line for huge Saudi contract as Man City put modest price tag on 34-year-old
arts.sum: Kyle Walker could be playing his final season at Manchester City. The 34-year-old is out of contract at the Etihad in 2026 and is unlikely to be offered a renewed deal. Despite coming close to joining Bayern Munich nearly 18 months ago, the rapid full-back remains a City player, but for how much longer? arts.ttl: Man City set for potential Lionel Messi meeting after FIFA decision made
arts.sum: Inter Miami will take part in next summer's Club World Cup, lining up against Manchester City, Chelsea, Real Madrid and others

arts.ttl: Gary Neville admits he'd be willing to break his own golden rule for Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Despite stating that the Three Lions’ manager must be English, ex-England right-back Gary Neville admitted his rule would be broken for genius Spaniard and Man City boss Pep Guardiola
